name: Monster Path
short_description: A procedurally generated monster collecting roguelike-JRPG with stacking power ups, a 2.5D storybook fantasy art style, and a dynamic score
detailed_description:
Monster Path is a JRPG roguelike adventure with turn based battles and monster collecting elements. Build a powerful party of monsters, each with unique stacking abilities, and engage in strategic turn-based battles.

gameplay

  • Balance risk and reward as you choose your path, decide which enemies to fight, and which power ups to stack
  • Complete quests as you move through the biomes to change the future monsters and game ending
  • 35+ Monsters to befriend, each with unique power ups
  • 9 biomes, 8 unique companions, and 100+ moves to compliment your build and play style
